title: Nori's Create Modpack
description: A modpack full of Create addons and performance mods for forge that I like to use !!! (❁´◡`❁)
body:
### Installation Requirements?
--------
Nope! All required mods have already been downloaded for you!

### About
--------
This modpack was made purely out of curiosity!
I was just a little interested in modding and accidentally ended up making a modpack!

### Mods Included
--------
Alex's Mobs, AppleSkin
Chipped, Chunk Loaders
Comforts, Create
Create Confectionery
Create Crafts & Additions, Create Deco
Create Jetpacks, Create: Copycat+
Create Interiors, Create: Steam & Rails
Farmer's Delight, Framed Blocks
Freecam, Fusion
Item Filters, Jade
JEI, MCW Bridges
MCW Doors, MCW Fences and Walls
MCW Furniture, MCW Paintings
MCW Trapdoors, Nature's Compass, Sophisticated Backpacks
Storage Drawers, Waystones
Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's Worldmap
XaeroPlus
